dossiers.bear_case: Cash burn -$437M, total debt $5.5B+ on $5.2B market cap. PE ~5389 (near-zero earnings). The 13D is founder-filed, not outside activist — could take months or never happen. Construction cycle risk.
dossiers.bull_case: Founders signaling take-private 5 months after IPO at $24.50 while stock trades at $20.47. $2.1M open-market insider buying. Nexus Capital ($5B AUM) just joined board. Analyst consensus at $39.
dossiers.catalyst: Founder-filed 13D with explicit take-private language; founders control 81% voting power; analysts avg target $39 (92% upside); Q1 revenue +38% YoY, raised guidance
dossiers.catalyst_timing: No specific date — take-private speculation could simmer for weeks/months
dossiers.priced_in_judgment: Take-private language is only 1 week old (June 23), market still digesting. Not fully priced in but no forced timeline.

dossiers.bear_case: 13D is passive pre-IPO holder disclosure, NOT activist. Already up 55% in 8 days from IPO. Tonlamarsen Phase 2 MISSED primary endpoint. Pre-revenue, lead data 12 months out. Insider 'buying' is IPO allocation at $16, not open-market conviction at $23+.
dossiers.bull_case: MyoKardia pedigree (BMS acquired for $13.1B), strong institutional backing, $600M+ cash post-IPO
dossiers.catalyst: Recent IPO (June 18) with Perceptive Advisors 8.9% stake (13D). MyoKardia team pedigree. $460M raised.
dossiers.catalyst_timing: No catalyst this week — lead program data H1 2027. Quiet period may expire ~July 5-7.
dossiers.priced_in_judgment: IPO hype driving price, not fundamentals. Extended after 55% run in 8 days.

dossiers.bear_case: 13D is passive VC disclosure, not activist. Post-IPO consolidation phase. Pre-revenue, Phase 3 one year away. Stock already 45% above IPO price despite pullback.
dossiers.bull_case: First-in-class mechanism, Regeneron partnership, $845M+ cash runway, FDA Fast Track + Orphan Drug designations
dossiers.catalyst: Largest-ever biotech IPO ($670M) on June 10. RA Capital 23.8% stake (13D). Regeneron $2.3B partnership. 74% ORR in desmoid tumors.
dossiers.catalyst_timing: No catalyst this week — analyst coverage initiation ~July 5-7 (after quiet period). Phase 3 not until H1 2027.
dossiers.priced_in_judgment: Strong company but no near-term catalyst. Post-IPO no-man's-land.

dossiers.bear_case: PE still 40.9x despite crash. BofA estimates $15B insurance commissions at AI risk. Founder Mark Jones Sr. sold $14.5M in 2026. 85% retention below industry. Already bounced 33% from lows — easy money may be captured.
dossiers.bull_case: Massively oversold compounder (56% off highs) with accelerating fundamentals. Akre's three-legged-stool conviction. COO buying at $37.50 (already up 25%). $280M buyback retiring 8% of float. New CTO reframes from AI victim to AI adopter. Consensus target $67-72 (43-55% upside).
dossiers.catalyst: Genuine insider cluster (COO bought at $37.50, GC first-ever purchase at $41.50) + Akre Capital largest institutional holder (added during decline). $280M active buyback ($50.3M in Q1). Q1 revenue +23%, EBITDA +57%, net income tripled.
dossiers.catalyst_timing: No hard catalyst this week. Earnings July 22. Soft catalysts: buyback in thin holiday week, short covering (5.15% SI), AI narrative shift from new CTO hire (June 15).
dossiers.priced_in_judgment: AI disruption fear overshot. Business is accelerating, not declining. The 56% drawdown priced in a growth slowdown that hasn't materialized. But no specific catalyst to force re-rating this week.

dossiers.bear_case: Commodity hostage — WTI crashed from $90 to $69 on Iran supply return. Doha talks THIS WEEK could push oil lower. Revenue missed by 23% in Q1 (price-driven). OPEC not cutting to offset Iran. Sector-wide de-rating ongoing.
dossiers.bull_case: Deep value at 12.8x PE, 2.9% yield. Consensus $65 target (30% upside). CEO loading up personally. Tweedy Browne (legendary value fund) doubled position. Hidden midstream asset worth $1.2-1.5B. Production guidance raised.
dossiers.catalyst: Strong insider cluster (CEO bought $350K in 1 month, 6 insiders total, 32 buys/0 sells trailing 12mo) + Tweedy Browne doubled position. Roth MKM re-upgraded to Buy June 22 ($65 target). Woodford well results pending.
dossiers.catalyst_timing: US-Iran Doha talks Tuesday June 30 (NEGATIVE catalyst for oil). EIA inventory data Wednesday. Woodford well results could pre-release anytime. Earnings July 28.
dossiers.priced_in_judgment: Oil price decline is the primary driver. At $69 WTI, MTDR is fairly valued. Upside requires oil bounce or company-specific catalyst (Woodford, midstream monetization).

dossiers.bear_case: Zero forward EBITDA ($0-10M guided). Egg oversupply is structural — foodservice demand permanently shifted to processed. ERP disaster lost shelf space. Active securities fraud class action. 85% of decline may be justified by fundamentals, not just sentiment.
dossiers.bull_case: Extreme short squeeze setup (47% SI). 10 insiders buying at $8-10 (already up ~25-40% from their buys). If ANY positive news hits, forced covering could drive 15-25%+ move. Premium egg brand with loyal consumers. Pasture-raised is a secular trend. Insiders have visibility into ERP recovery and shelf space recapture.
dossiers.catalyst: 10 insiders buying after 79% crash (from $53 to $11). 32-47% short interest with 5.2 days to cover = explosive squeeze potential. PE 10.8 on trailing.
dossiers.catalyst_timing: No specific catalyst this week. Q2 earnings August 6. Holiday-shortened week with thin volume could amplify squeeze.
dossiers.priced_in_judgment: Most of the bad news IS priced in at $11 (10.8x trailing PE, 79% off highs). But forward earnings are near zero, so 'priced in' depends on recovery timeline. Insiders are betting on recovery; shorts are betting against it.
